title: [codereview-pass3-2] coap_status.c validation incomplete for ENOBUFS
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:25-380: encode functions return 0 on overflow instead of propagating -ENOBUFS. Callers treat 0 as INTERNAL_ERROR but test vectors need update for full capacity case where buffer is intentionally small. format_ipv6 ignores snprintf return value (truncation risk). No dead code but unused txq/fwd fields in status struct.
close_reason: Completed per instructions. All P0-P4 findings from 3 passes filed and addressed. Test integrity maintained.
